positive: Minimalist geometric representation of a majestic mountain peak, viewed at dawn. The style is a blend of abstract mid-century modern graphic design and elegant nature illustration. Use strong, clean silhouettes with deep indigo blues and muted terracotta orange, creating a dramatic color gradient. Focus on sharp, interlocking shapes that suggest both rugged topography and soothing geometry. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, ideal for repeating apparel prints. Use negative space effectively to enhance the perceived depth and scale. Flat vector aesthetic, high contrast, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logo, trademark, cartoon, sketch, gradient fill, soft focus, noise, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, extra limbs
